panels.title: Aircraft Now
panels.description: Unique aircraft seen in the last 60 seconds

targets.rawSql: SELECT uniq(hex_ident) as count FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 60 SECOND

panels.title: Messages / min
panels.description: ADS-B messages received per minute (last 5 min avg)

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() / 5 as msg_per_min FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
SELECT uniq(hex_ident) as count FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp > today()
SELECT formatReadableQuantity(count()) as total FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp > today()
SELECT toStartOfFiveMinutes(timestamp) AS time, uniq(hex_ident) AS aircraft FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) AS time, count() AS messages FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT altitude FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND altitude IS NOT NULL AND altitude > 0 AND altitude < 50000

SELECT hex_ident, anyLast(callsign) AS callsign, max(altitude) AS max_alt_ft, round(avg(ground_speed), 0) AS avg_speed_kts, count() AS msgs, max(timestamp) AS last_seen FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE AND callsign != '' GROUP BY hex_ident ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Altitude Traces (Top Aircraft)
panels.description: Altitude over time for the 5 most active aircraft in the last hour

targets.rawSql: WITH top_aircraft AS (SELECT hex_ident FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND altitude IS NOT NULL GROUP BY hex_ident ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT timestamp AS time, altitude AS value, concat(hex_ident, coalesce(concat(' (', callsign, ')'), '')) AS metric FROM adsb.positions WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND hex_ident IN (SELECT hex_ident FROM top_aircraft) AND altitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time
